category_sources: source_facts.description says it accesses GitHub .gitignore boilerplates; source_facts.executables lists gibo as a CLI.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gibo; current_curation.display-name is gibo.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo both point to the official GitHub project; README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GIFLIB homepage links to SourceForge project resources, and SourceForge exposes the GIFLIB code browser at /p/giflib/code/.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions GitHub .gitignore boilerplates; source_facts.executables lists a command-line executable.
